text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Pfft! What even? Ahaha! This is so not<n>fair!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Oh my gosh, Trainer! My mom sent me a<n>picture
of my little sisters and... Ahaha!<n>Their faces are so
silly!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
When I have a race coming up, she tries<n>to make
me laugh by sending pictures<n>like this. Well, she
sure got me this time!<n>Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I think she's saying, "Get out there with<n>that smile
of yours and have fun!" Hehe,<n>can't let her down
now, can I? ♪
